name: Feature Development Pipeline
description: Implements, verifies, and tests a feature across three OpenHands agents. The repository folder is passed between agents as a shared workspace artifact.

inputs.description: Path to the local repository the agents will work in. This folder is mounted as /workspace in each agent container.

output.description: Test results for the implemented feature

steps.user_prompt:
{{input}}

Implement this feature in the repository at /workspace. Write clean, well-documented code following the existing project conventions.

Review the implementation in /workspace. Use all available variables and information to RUN the code, and validate that it produces the actual intended outputs. Check for correctness, security issues, code quality, and adherence to project conventions. Fix any critical issues you find directly in the code.
Write comprehensive automated tests for the feature implemented in /workspace. Run the tests and report results. Ensure all tests pass before finishing.
